title: Matrices, Job Dependencies, Outputs, and Immutable Artifacts · Mastery Check
summary: A release board compares near-miss decisions for matrices, job dependencies, outputs, and immutable artifacts and requires the learner to defend the smallest safe matrix and artifact handoff contract. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for matrix and artifact handoff contract. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Design include and exclude rules, experimental axes, fail-fast, max-parallel, names, and support-policy coverage without combinatorial waste.
Trace needs dependencies, job results, always and failure conditions, skipped ancestors, and cleanup behavior through a directed graph.
Write multiline-safe step outputs, promote validated job outputs, handle size and secret redaction limits, and parse downstream types explicitly.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# cicd-github-actions cumulative delivery-system portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic workflow, policy, artifact, and release evidence review only.
# They never call GitHub APIs, start runners, execute learner commands, access Docker or registries, exchange OIDC tokens, or contact cloud services.
workspace: cicd
version-baseline:
  checkout: 7.0.0
  setup-node: 7.0.0
  upload-artifact: 7.0.1
  download-artifact: 8.0.1
  attest: 4.1.1
  node: 24-lts
  typescript-native: 7.0.2
  typescript-api-compatibility: 6.0.2
  build-push-action: 7
  google-auth: 3
  deploy-cloudrun: 3
transfer-boundary: authorized-disposable-delivery-environment
evidence:

steps.title: Reconstruct the defensible process · Quiz Ci Matrix Axis Coverage
steps.instruction:
Order the Ci Matrix Axis Coverage delivery-system evidence cycle for this quiz task before implementing it.

Evidence target: Reconstruct the defensible process · Quiz Ci Matrix Axis Coverage.
steps.why: Correct order keeps Ci Matrix Axis Coverage assumptions visible before execution and verifies its result against a boundary case afterward. For Reconstruct the defensible process · Quiz Ci Matrix Axis Coverage, keep Ci Matrix Axis Coverage connected to mechanically reviewable workflow, trust, artifact, deployment, and recovery evidence.

content.text: A quiz matrix excludes one supported platform, overwrites artifact names, passes string outputs as booleans, and downloads an executable from another run. Prove graph results, types, producer identity, digest, layout, and trust. Competency probe: Design include and exclude rules, experimental axes, fail-fast, max-parallel, names, and support-policy coverage without combinatorial waste.
